message:
feat(storage): complete Phase 5A — schema loading, cookies, storage cursors

- Close bd-1soh (5A.4): schema loading from sqlite_master via
  compat_persist::load_from_sqlite pipeline with 6 new tests.
  Fix build_create_table_sql to include PRIMARY KEY for IPK columns.
- Close bd-3mmj (5A.5): schema cookie tracking across Connection,
  VDBE engine, and persistence layers with 14 tests.
- Close bd-24i5 (5B.1): storage cursors enabled by default with 10 tests.
- Close bd-19xv: Phase 5A epic (all 5 children complete).
- Fix 6 compat_persist test call sites for new persist_to_sqlite signature.
- Add create_table_at() to MemDatabase for real root page numbers.
- Add ReadCookie/SetCookie opcode handlers and schema_cookie field to VDBE.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
